title: The application of agricultural drones as an IPM method from the perspective of Hungarian farmers
subtitle: Agrárdrónok, mint IPM módszer alkalmazása a magyar gazdák szemszögéből
description: A practice abstract exploring Hungarian farmers’ perspectives on using agricultural drones for integrated pest management, emphasizing benefits such as reduced environmental impact, trampling damage, and up to 90% pesticide savings through precise monitoring and spraying. It also outlines key barriers like unclear legal frameworks, lack of state support and expertise, and details requirements for drone qualification, pesticide authorization, and regulatory development in Hungary.
